arts.ttl: Man City equal Champions League record originally set by Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester City's 4-0 win over Slovan Bratislava on Tuesday got Pep Guardiola's side up and running in the Champions League for the season, having been held by Inter on matchday one. United returned to the final a year later, going through 12 more games unbeaten in 2008/09, but then lost against an ultimately treble-winning Barcelona side in Rome.

arts.ttl: Man United given huge concern as Paul Scholes agrees with Gary Lineker about Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a dismal start to the new Premier League season, and their struggles have been laid bare in recent weeks, leaving Erik ten Hag under increasing pressure

arts.ttl: Andy Dunn's Man Utd Q&A - Five key questions for Erik ten Hag amid growing Old Trafford crisis
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED Q&A: Our Chief Sports Writer Andy Dunn answers YOUR questions on the growing issues at Manchester United ahead of their Europa League clash with Porto

arts.ttl: Liverpool Firm Admirers of 70m Man Utd Target and Could Make January Bid
arts.sum: Liverpool are firm admirers of Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite and could hijack Manchester Uniteds plans to pursue the Englishman in 2025.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes on same page as Gary Lineker as Erik ten Hag's Man Utd job hangs in balance
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Paul Scholes admitted Manchester United are going backwards in terms of progress following a disastrous start to the season which has seen them slip to 13th in the table

arts.ttl: I heard Ten Hag raise his voice only once and it was over his own decision at Manchester United
arts.sum: Five hours on a plane was hardly the preparation Erik ten Hag will have wanted ahead of two crunch games for Man United this week.

arts.sum: FC Porto and Manchester United go head-to-head in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United academy notebook: Shea Lacey returns and why Sekou Kone hasn't made his debut
